decisions.decision: LoanForm resolves item def ID → available inventory row UUID at pick time via inventoryApi.available
decisions.rationale: Backend expects inventory_id (row UUID), but UI pickers work with item definition IDs

decisions.decision: Dates serialized as T00:00:00Z suffix in useLoanMutations before sending to API
decisions.rationale: HTML date inputs return YYYY-MM-DD; backend expects RFC3339 datetime strings

decisions.decision: LoanRepository.Delete replaced with explicit error stub instead of silent no-op
decisions.rationale: CR-02 fix — prevents pendingchange workflow from silently believing deletion succeeded

decisions.decision: WR-01/WR-02 non-atomic save documented via TODO comments rather than full fix
decisions.rationale: Transaction wrapping requires TxManager wiring deferred to avoid scope creep

next_action: Commit the uncommitted post-review files (see uncommitted_files list), then run human UAT per 62-HUMAN-UAT.md
